methodology: Independent annotation of BullaGuard blind-spot predictions. For each predicted blind spot, raw JSON Schema constraints (type, format, enum, pattern, min/max, description) are compared across tool pairs WITHOUT using BullaGuard's dimension classifier. A prediction is CONFIRMED if (a) the field is genuinely hidden from one tool's observable schema, or (b) the raw schemas show incompatible constraints. A prediction is FALSE_POSITIVE if both tools expose the field with compatible schemas and the field is observable on both sides. MISSED spots are same-named fields with incompatible schemas that BullaGuard did not flag.
